objective_hint: Build cash, then find an invitation at the bigger rooms.

visible_cues: The clerk watches the register more than the door.

suspicion_cues: The clerk glances up when you linger near the counter.

objective_hint: Build cash, then find an invitation at the bigger rooms.

visible_cues: A parked car idles too long under the neon spill.

suspicion_cues: The seller keeps one eye on the mouth of the alley.

objective_hint: Build cash, then find an invitation at the bigger rooms.

visible_cues: Footsteps pass the door whenever the sign buzzes.

suspicion_cues: The front desk phone rings once and stops.

objective_hint: Build cash, then find an invitation at the bigger rooms.

visible_cues: The bartender notices repeat wins more than small bets.

suspicion_cues: A regular looks over after your third good roll.

objective_hint: Build cash, then find an invitation at the bigger rooms.

visible_cues: The cashier mirrors your movement in the cooler glass.

suspicion_cues: A camera dome above the coolers twitches once.

objective_hint: Win enough, then chase an invitation at the bigger rooms.

visible_cues: A door guard remembers everyone who walks in twice.

suspicion_cues: The guard near the side door stops laughing when you win.

objective_hint: Buy the trio rounds, stay for the set, and earn rare luck gear.

visible_cues: The bartender cares more about the band than the door.

suspicion_cues: The room quiets for half a beat when someone walks in hot.

objective_hint: Work the room, then claim the Grand Casino invitation.

visible_cues: The floor staff look away from small sins when the champagne keeps moving.

suspicion_cues: The host smiles at your action and counts the empty glasses.

objective_hint: Ride the boat, then claim the Grand Casino invitation.

visible_cues: The deck boss is polite, but the rail leaves nowhere to disappear.

suspicion_cues: The river keeps everyone aboard with their tells.

objective_hint: Cool off near the riverboat before returning to the circuit.
suspicion_cues: Only the tide keeps score here.

visual_context.description: Barred glass, locked shelves, and one sell tray.

objective_hint: Pawn gear for cash, or buy it back before Sal keeps it.

visible_cues: Sal keeps the glass shut unless you set something on the tray.

suspicion_cues: The barred window stays shut unless you put something on the tray.

objective_hint: Win $10 on the Grand Casino floor for a Players Card.

demo_objective.title: Beat the Grand Casino
demo_objective.summary: Earn the Players Card clean or survive Rourke's back-room call.
demo_objective.victory_message: Demo Victory: you earned the Grand Casino Players Card.
demo_objective.finale_trigger_message: Rourke calls you to the house table.

visible_cues: Rourke watches anyone whose wins look too clean.

pit_boss.label: Pit Boss Rourke
pit_boss.watched_text: Rourke is watching; cheating heat spikes.
pit_boss.clear_text: Rourke is turned away for the moment.

suspicion_cues: Every repeated edge makes the pit boss look up.

tenure.expiry_message: The prepaid motel room expires and housekeeping clears out anything you left.

visible_cues: The room is private until the paid stay runs out.

suspicion_cues: Nobody is watching the room yet.

tenure.eviction_message: The landlord changes the lock and clears out anything you stored.

visible_cues: The apartment is quiet until rent comes due.

suspicion_cues: The hallway is quiet for now.

tenure.eviction_message: The house is lost and the trunk is gone with it.

visible_cues: The house stays quiet until the first payment hits.

suspicion_cues: The street is quiet outside the curtains.
